summary.en: A framework for turning environment signals and critical uncertainties into multiple plausible futures, then testing which business-model moves remain robust across them.
summary.zh: 一套把环境信号和关键不确定性转成多个可信未来，并检验哪些商业模式动作在多个情景下都稳健的框架。

sources.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday · 1991

references.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday

note.en: Classic source for scenario thinking, driving forces, critical uncertainties, and strategy robustness across futures.
note.zh: 情景思考、驱动力、关键不确定性和跨未来稳健战略的经典来源。
